text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hah hah! To think someone as brilliant and
prudent as myself would get injured!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It seems that the physics of the Earth weren't
quite able to keep up with my Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Come on, Earth! Try to keep up next time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...All right! With this, it's perfect! Let's hurry and
resume training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I'm a genius! Each one of my cells is
extraordinary. Even if I get injured, I'll recover
quickly!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! I'm a genius! Each one of my cells is
extraordinary. Even if I get injured, I'll recover
quickly!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A bad idea?! Please be reasonable! I'm raring to
go! And so is the earth beneath my feet!

...Despite being visibly dissatisfied, I somehow
manage to convince her to take a rest.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
H-huh?! For some reason, the pain is getting
worse?!

Her energetic movements cause her injury to get
worse... I ask her to focus on recuperating.

Sakura Bakushin O runs energetically towards the
training track.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh! Perfect, right? It seems the Earth also
showed some regret.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is the leadership power of a model student!
The power of recovery!

Just as her mysterious theory predicted, she
underwent a miraculous recovery... and became
able to resume her training right away!
